---
title: "News"
subtitle: "Updates from the working groups activities"
toc: false
comments: false
listing:
    contents: "./news/*.qmd"
    image-height: 200px
    image-align: left
    fields: [image, title, date, categories, description]
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    grid-item-align: center
    sort: "date desc"
---
